query:
UPDATE games SET rotNums = CASE awayTeam
  WHEN 'creighton' THEN '689/690'
  WHEN 'minnesota' THEN '691/692'
  WHEN 'fordham' THEN '693/694'
  WHEN 'texas' THEN '695/696'
  WHEN 'marquette' THEN '697/698'
  WHEN 'duquesne' THEN '699/700'
  WHEN 'california' THEN '701/702'
  WHEN 'uab' THEN '703/704'
  WHEN 'st_josephs' THEN '705/706'
  WHEN 'miami_fl' THEN '707/708'
  WHEN 'st_bonaventure' THEN '709/710'
  WHEN 'ohio_state' THEN '711/712'
  WHEN 'villanova' THEN '713/714'
  WHEN 'maryland' THEN '715/716'
  WHEN 'rice' THEN '717/718'
  WHEN 'loyola_chicago' THEN '719/720'
  WHEN 'purdue' THEN '721/722'
  WHEN 'stanford' THEN '723/724'
  WHEN 'baylor' THEN '725/726'
  WHEN 'florida_state' THEN '727/728'
  WHEN 'colorado_state' THEN '729/730'
  WHEN 'usc' THEN '731/732'
  WHEN 'ul_lafayette' THEN '733/734'
  WHEN 'georgia_southern' THEN '735/736'
  WHEN 'eastern_illinois' THEN '737/738'
  WHEN 'little_rock' THEN '739/740'
  WHEN 'umkc' THEN '741/742'
  WHEN 'northern_kentucky' THEN '743/744'
  WHEN 'milwaukee' THEN '745/746'
  WHEN 'youngstown_state' THEN '747/748'
  WHEN 'cleveland_state' THEN '749/750'
  WHEN 'jacksonville' THEN '306549/306550'
  WHEN 'north_alabama' THEN '306551/306552'
  WHEN 'stetson' THEN '306553/306554'
  WHEN 'north_florida' THEN '306555/306556'
  WHEN 'gardner_webb' THEN '306557/306558'
  WHEN 'stonehill' THEN '306559/306560'
  WHEN 'fairleigh_dickinson' THEN '306561/306562'
  WHEN 'wagner' THEN '306563/306564'
  WHEN 'chicago_state' THEN '306565/306566'
  ELSE rotNums
END
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-04';
